calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-20-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Beldon Yee.
David S. wright, Esq. for Petitioner: Alexandre Costa Aguiar, also present, was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Patricia Peretz Aguiar, and further orders the gender changed from Male to Female.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jun-06-2006 Reset To Jun-20-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name and Gender.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Denise Carpenter.
David Wright, Esq. for Petitioner: Alexander Costa Aguiar, not present.
At counsel's request, matter is continued to June 20, 2006 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, for an appearance of the Petitioner.
